title: workspace
subHeroDesc: KeilHQ is built around Organisations and Spaces. Your sidebar, settings, and onboarding flow keep every task, doc, and message scoped to the right context automatically.
capabilitiesDesc: Personal mode is always available. Add organisations, create spaces, and invite teammates — every API call respects your active org and space.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Org & Space Model
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Nested org switcher with checkmarks on active space. Create orgs with auto-generated General space or join via invitation token.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Settings Dialog
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Account, preferences, AI assistant, task defaults, notification toggles, connectors, sessions, billing, and org management — all in one place.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Onboarding Wizard
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Welcome flow for new users: display name, plan selection, first organisation, and team invites before landing on the dashboard.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Navigate dashboard, tasks, motion, chat, notifications, meetings, and settings with full keyboard control. Reference panel via ⌘/.

checklistDesc: The application shell is persistent across every page — sidebar navigation, real-time notification badges, and meeting minimised pills included.
checklistItems: Org management: create, join, invite tokens, member roles (Owner, Admin, Member), and space privacy controls.,
Settings cover appearance, time format, calendar preferences, AI toggles, task section defaults, and per-type notification controls.,
Sidebar search for quick lookup, theme toggle (Light / Dark / System), and profile photo upload.,
Meeting Studio minimises to a sidebar pill with elapsed time — restore with one click or ⌘M.,
